bundle.longDescription: A local-first document editor producing self-contained HTML files. No cloud. No account. EUPL-1.2 licensed.

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:

_notes.tauri-version: v1.x — required for macOS 10.13 High Sierra. When dev machine is upgraded to macOS 10.15+ or Linux becomes primary build host, migrate to tauri v2: replace allowlist with capabilities/, update Cargo.toml, update src/js/bridge.js invoke calls (API is compatible).
_notes.csp-connect-src-none: Intentional. This application makes zero outbound network connections. If you are adding a feature that requires network access, add it to connect-src explicitly with a specific origin — never use a wildcard.
_notes.withGlobalTauri: Set to true so window.__TAURI__ is available in src/js/*.js without a module bundler. This avoids requiring a build step for the frontend.
